name: westernrmp
description: Cross-browser release tooling and tests for WesternRMP.

scripts.lint:firefox: npm run stage && web-ext lint --source-dir build/firefox
scripts.package:firefox: npm run stage && web-ext build --source-dir build/firefox --artifacts-dir dist --filename westernrmp-firefox-v1.1.0.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:chrome: npm run stage && web-ext build --source-dir build/chrome --artifacts-dir dist --filename westernrmp-chrome-v1.1.0.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.release: npm test && npm run lint:firefox && npm run package:firefox && npm run package:chrome
